untranslatable_reason: Signal specifies multiple thresholds ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]): bb_std_dev, bb_period, macd_fast, macd_slow, macd_signal periods, and sensitivity parameter. Bollinger Band and MACD parameters are pre-calculated in allowed indicators but specific period/sensitivity values are not provided. Additionally, 'No opposing momentum present' cannot be operationalized without explicit definition of what constitutes opposing momentum. Stop loss threshold is undefined.
translation_notes: Translated directional logic: LONG entry when price penetrates below lower BB and MACD fast line (macd) turns downward and is below zero; SHORT entry uses inverse logic. Exit conditions use MACD reversal and BB middle band crossover as proxies. Used standard MACD (macd vs macd_signal) rather than undefined fast/slow/signal periods. Signal requires parameter specification before backtesting.
